tasks.title: Custom tool discovery scans TOOL.md instead of .ts/.js
tasks.description: Custom tool discovery was scanning TOOL.md instead of .ts/.js files. This has been fixed.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify custom tool discovery correctly scans .ts/.js files
RunTestSuite: execute tool discovery tests to ensure no regressions

tasks.title: Custom tools not registered with ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Custom tools were not being registered with the ToolRegistry. This has been fixed.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify custom tools are registered in ToolRegistry
RunTestSuite: execute registration tests to ensure tools are available

tasks.title: Plugin tool registration missing
tasks.description: Plugin tool registration was missing. This has been fixed.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify plugin tools are properly registered
RunTestSuite: execute plugin registration tests

tasks.title: Fix Duplicate directory_scanner.rs
tasks.description: Fix duplicate directory_scanner.rs files: delete crates/core/src/config/directory_scanner.rs and update crates/core/src/lib.rs to use opencode_config::DirectoryScanner. Technical Debt: TD-011
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify core builds without directory_scanner.rs in core/src/config
AddUnitTest: verify DirectoryScanner is correctly imported from opencode_config
RunTestSuite: execute config-related tests to ensure no breakage
tasks.impl_notes: Module: config/core - HIGH priority, blocks release. Steps: 1) Read crates/core/src/config/directory_scanner.rs to confirm contents, 2) Read crates/config/src/directory_scanner.rs to verify duplicates, 3) Delete crates/core/src/config/directory_scanner.rs, 4) Update crates/core/src/lib.rs to use opencode_config::DirectoryScanner, 5) Search for remaining references to deleted file, 6) Verify with cargo build and tests

tasks.title: Audit Two ToolRegistry Implementations
tasks.description: Audit two ToolRegistry implementations: crates/core/src/tool.rs and crates/tools/src/registry.rs. Trace all usages of core::ToolRegistry in agent runtime, verify which features from opencode_tools::ToolRegistry are needed, and determine consolidation approach. Technical Debt: TD-012
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify core::ToolRegistry functionality is preserved after audit
AddIntegrationTest: verify agent runtime works with consolidated registry
AddRegressionTest: ensure all tool operations work correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Module: core/tools - HIGH priority, blocks release. Options: A) Consolidate to single registry, B) Document intentional separation, C) Migrate agent to use full-featured registry

tasks.title: Add Route-Group Tests
tasks.description: Add explicit route group tests for MCP, config, and provider endpoints. Reference: FR-004
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/mcp/servers endpoint returns correct responses
AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/mcp/tools endpoint returns correct responses
AddIntegrationTest: verify MCP server registration workflow
AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/config endpoints work correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/providers endpoints work correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Module: server. Add tests for MCP route group (servers, tools), config route group, and provider route group

tasks.title: Add Malformed Request Body Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for malformed request bodies including invalid JSON, missing required fields, extra unknown fields, wrong field types, empty body, and invalid session/message IDs. Reference: FR-004
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify missing required fields returns 400 Bad Request
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify extra unknown fields are handled gracefully
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify wrong field types returns 400 Bad Request
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify empty body returns 400 Bad Request
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify operations on non-existent session return 404
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify operations on deleted session return 410 Gone
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify invalid session ID format returns 400 Bad Request
tasks.impl_notes: Module: server. Added 18 new negative tests covering invalid JSON types, wrong field types, malformed syntax, invalid session IDs, and regression tests. All 44 negative tests pass.

tasks.title: Add Hook Determinism Test
tasks.description: Add test to verify sorted_plugin_names() returns consistent ordering across 100 invocations with different plugin priorities. Reference: FR-008
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: register multiple plugins with different priorities
AddRegressionTest: verify sorted_plugin_names() returns consistent order across 100 calls
RunTestSuite: execute sorted_plugin_names test to verify determinism
tasks.impl_notes: Module: plugin. Tests already exist in plugin/src/lib.rs:3763-3945. 9 tests for sorted_plugin_names() determinism including test_sorted_plugin_names_returns_consistent_order_100_iterations (line 3763) and test_sorted_plugin_names_determinism_with_mixed_priorities (line 3924). Build fails due to system resource issues (SIGKILL), not code issues.

tasks.title: Add Security Tests
tasks.description: Add SQL injection and path traversal security tests. Reference: FR-004
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify SQL injection in session IDs is prevented
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify SQL injection in message content is prevented
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify path traversal in file operations is prevented
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify ../ in paths is properly sanitized
tasks.impl_notes: Module: server. Tests already exist: 11 SQL injection tests (security_injection_tests) and 14 path traversal tests (security_path_traversal_tests). Fixed compilation error: missing temp_db_dir field in api_negative_tests module.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing BufferDiff
tasks.description: Implement cell-by-cell comparison of ratatui Buffer with x,y position reporting of differences, configurable ignore options (foreground, background, attributes), and human-readable diff output. Reference: FR-025
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify cell-by-cell Buffer comparison works correctly
AddUnitTest: verify x,y position reporting of differences
AddUnitTest: verify configurable ignore options (foreground, background, attributes)
AddUnitTest: verify human-readable diff output format
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Full BufferDiff implementation with cell-by-cell comparison, x,y position reporting, IgnoreOptions for configurable comparison, and DiffResult with human-readable Display implementation. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing StateTester
tasks.description: Implement JSON state capture mechanism, snapshot comparison, and JSON diff reporting. Reference: FR-026
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify JSON state capture mechanism works correctly
AddUnitTest: verify snapshot comparison functionality
AddUnitTest: verify JSON diff reporting provides useful output
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Full StateTester implementation with StateSnapshot, StateDiff, StateDiffEntry, and DiffType types. Includes capture_state, compare, assert_state methods. All 27 state tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing TestDsl
tasks.description: Implement widget rendering to Buffer, PTY/BufferDiff/StateTester composition, fluent API with method chaining, and wait-for predicate support. Reference: FR-027
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify widget rendering to Buffer works correctly
AddUnitTest: verify PTY/BufferDiff/StateTester composition
AddUnitTest: verify fluent API with method chaining
AddUnitTest: verify wait-for predicate support
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Full implementation includes: 1) Widget rendering to Buffer using TestBackend/Terminal, 2) PTY/BufferDiff/StateTester composition via fluent API, 3) Method chaining with builder pattern (with_size, init_terminal, with_pty, with_buffer_diff, with_state_tester, render, etc.), 4) Wait-for predicate support with wait_for, wait_with_predicates, poll_until, and poll_until_async methods. All 55 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing CliTester
tasks.description: Implement process spawning with arguments, stdout/stderr capture, exit code capture, and temp directory cleanup. Reference: FR-028
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify process spawning with arguments works correctly
AddUnitTest: verify stdout/stderr capture
AddUnitTest: verify exit code capture
AddUnitTest: verify temp directory cleanup
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Read current stub in ratatui-testing/src/cli.rs and implement full functionality

tasks.title: Release Qualification
tasks.description: Run full test suite, clippy, formatting check, doc tests, performance benchmarks, memory profiling, security audit, and documentation completeness check for release.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: execute cargo test --all-features to verify all tests pass
AddRegressionTest: run cargo clippy to ensure code quality
AddRegressionTest: run cargo fmt to ensure formatting compliance
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test --doc to verify documentation tests
tasks.impl_notes: Phase 6 release qualification. Must pass all tests before release.
